text:
You will learn to sort objects into category E or K and receive feedback.

You see a big black square. You press <<K>>. The correct category is K.
You see a small white triangle. You press <<E>>. The correct category is E.
You see a big white square. You press <<E>>. The correct category is K.
You see a small black square. You press <<K>>. The correct category is E.

You will choose between two gambles on each round.

Gamble A pays 5 points. Gamble B pays 3 or 8 points. You choose <<A>>. You won 5 points.
Gamble A pays 5 points. Gamble B pays 3 or 8 points. You choose <<B>>. You won 8 points.
Gamble A pays 5 points. Gamble B pays 3 or 8 points. You choose <<B>>. You won 3 points.
This transcript contains only instructions and no annotated participant responses at all.
